c6662e22-84c9-441b-966a-0e744f08e5c8.result_content_preview:
IANA-managed Reserved Domains
Certain domains are set aside, and nominally registered to “IANA”, for specific
		policy or technical purposes.
Example domains
As described in
RFC 2606
and
RFC 6761
,
	a number of domains such as
example.com
and
example.org
are maintained for documentation purposes. These domains may be used as illustrative
	examples in documents without prior coordination with us. They are 
	not available for registration or transfer.
Test IDN top-level domains
These domains were

final_output.final_deliverable:
Results

1) Exact H1 text from https://example.com

- Extraction: Example Domain
- Verbatim quote from the page (RAW VISIT CONTENT): "Example Domain"
- Source / citation: https://example.com

2) Exact domain of the external link from https://example.com

- Extraction (exact domain): iana.org
- Verbatim evidence that the page contains link text: "Learn more" (from the example.com RAW VISIT CONTENT). Quote: "Learn more" (https://example.com)
- Verbatim evidence showing the external link URL found by the visit/scan: "https://iana.org/domains/example" (from the visit record for https://example.com)
  - Quote from the visit record: "links": ["https://iana.org/domains/example"] (source: visit result for https://example.com)
- Source / citation for the link target: https://iana.org/domains/example

3) One URL citation for each visited page

- https://example.com (page visited; H1 and page text quoted above)
- https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved (IANA Reserved Domains page visited)

Supporting verbatim quotes from the RAW VISIT CONTENT (primary evidence)

- From https://example.com (RAW VISIT CONTENT):
  "Example Domain
  Example Domain
  This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations.
  Learn more"
  (https://example.com)

- From https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved (RAW VISIT CONTENT):
  "IANA-managed Reserved Domains"
  (https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved)

- Also from the IANA page (showing example domains mention) (RAW VISIT CONTENT):
  "As described in
  RFC 2606
  and
  RFC 6761
  ,
   a number of domains such as
  example.com
  and
  example.org
  are maintained for documentation purposes. These domains may be used as illustrative
   examples in documents without prior coordination with us. They are 
   not available for registration or transfer."
  (https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved)

Notes on evidence used

- The H1 text "Example Domain" was taken directly from the example.com RAW VISIT CONTENT (see quote above) and is cited to https://example.com.
- The presence of a link labeled "Learn more" is shown in the example.com RAW VISIT CONTENT (see quote above). The visit record for https://example.com lists the external link URL exactly as "https://iana.org/domains/example", from which the link's domain is iana.org. Both the example.com visit record and the link target URL are cited above.
- The IANA reserved page visit and its title / supporting text are quoted directly from the RAW VISIT CONTENT for https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and are cited to that URL.

All factual claims above are supported by the quoted raw page content and the visit record link list. URL citations for every claim are provided inline above.
final_output.action_summary: Returned: (1) H1 from https://example.com is exactly "Example Domain" (quoted from the page); (2) the external link on example.com points to https://iana.org/domains/example, so the exact domain is "iana.org" (visit record: "https://iana.org/domains/example" and the example.com page shows the link text "Learn more"); (3) URL citations: https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved (both quoted). All quotations and citations provided.
